announcement.text: Admissions open for Academic Year 2026–27 — Nursery to Class 10.

footer.blurb: Nurturing young minds from Nursery to Class 10 since 2015 — academic excellence, strong values, and holistic development in the heart of Bhagyanagar, Koppal.
footer.newsletterBlurb: School news, circulars, and event updates in your inbox.

hero.badge: Nursery to Class 10 · Bhagyanagar, Koppal, Karnataka · Est. 2015
hero.subTagline: Nurturing young minds from Nursery to Class 10 through academic excellence, values, and holistic development.

welcome.p1: Since 2015, Pioneer Public School has stood for a simple belief: the children of Bhagyanagar, Koppal deserve an education as ambitious as any in the world — and as rooted as the banyan tree in our courtyard.
welcome.p2: Here, a child learns to solve equations and touch elders' feet, to code and to sing, to compete fiercely and to share freely. That is the Pioneer way.
welcome.quote: “Every child carries a spark. Our job is to give it wind.”

promise.title: Four promises. Zero fine print.
promise.description: What every family can hold us to, from the first bell of Nursery to the last exam of Class 10.

items.title: Academic Excellence
items.description: Concept-first teaching that turns marks into a by-product of genuine understanding — crowned by a 100% SSLC pass record.
items.back: Every child learns differently. We teach that way — visual, kinesthetic, auditory. Results follow understanding.

items.title: Mentors, Not Just Teachers
items.description: Twenty-plus educators who know every child by name, notice every quiet talent, and never let a question go unanswered.
items.back: Parent-teacher meetings aren't formalities here. They're conversations about potential, not just percentages.

items.title: A Safe, Joyful Campus
items.description: Supervised spaces, safe transport, and a culture of kindness — so the only thing children bring home is enthusiasm.
items.back: GPS-tracked buses, CCTV, trained staff at every gate. Safety isn't a feature — it's a foundation.

items.title: The Whole Child
items.description: Yoga at sunrise, cricket at noon, music by dusk. Marks matter; character, curiosity, and courage matter more.
items.back: Sports, arts, community service, leadership roles — the parts of school that children remember at fifty.

academics.title: One journey, six chapters.
academics.description: From finger paints to board exams — each stage designed to hand the child confidently to the next.

spirit.description: Shlokas and science. Kannada and code. Festivals and physics. Our children grow up fluent in both their heritage and their future.

values.title: Six pillars. One culture.
values.description: Ancient wisdom woven into modern education — tap each value to discover how it lives at Pioneer.

items.title: Respect
items.description: Touching feet of elders and standing for teachers shows humility and reverence for knowledge — a daily ritual at Pioneer.

items.title: Wisdom
items.description: The ancient teacher-student bond, alive in every classroom. Our teachers mentor, not merely instruct.

items.title: Purity
items.description: Like the lotus that blooms in mud, our children rise above circumstances through education and self-belief.

items.title: Energy
items.description: The boundless energy of childhood, channelled into academics, sports, arts, and community service.

items.title: Roots
items.description: Like the banyan tree, we grow wide and strong. Rooted in Indian values, our branches reach toward the world.

items.title: Balance
items.description: Equal weight to marks and character, competition and compassion, ambition and humility.

facilities.title: Built for curious minds.
facilities.description: Every corner of our campus is a classroom in disguise.

items.name: Smart Classrooms
items.description: Digital boards and audio-visual aids make every lesson interactive and engaging.

items.name: Science Lab
items.description: A well-equipped laboratory where students learn physics, chemistry, and biology by doing.

items.name: Computer Lab
items.description: Modern systems with structured computer education from primary classes onwards.

items.name: Library
items.description: A quiet, inviting space stocked with story books, references, and periodicals for all ages.

items.name: Sports Ground
items.description: Spacious grounds for cricket, kho-kho, kabaddi, athletics, and daily physical education.

items.name: School Transport
items.description: Safe, GPS-monitored buses covering Bhagyanagar, Koppal and surrounding areas with trained staff.

items.name: Music Room
items.description: Vocal and instrumental music sessions that nurture rhythm, confidence, and creativity.

items.name: Art Room
items.description: A colourful studio for drawing, painting, and craft where imagination takes shape.

studentLife.title: Life between the bells.
studentLife.description: Sports days and science fairs, Holi colours and heritage trips — the moments children remember at fifty.

achievements.title: Small town. Big trophies.
achievements.description: Our students compete with the best — and more often than not, come home smiling.

testimonials.title: Don’t take our word for it.

cta.title1: The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago.
cta.title2: The best time to enrol is today.
cta.description: Seats are limited across Nursery to Class 10. Begin your child's Pioneer journey with a single click — or a single visit.

admissions-open-2026-27.title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2026–27
admissions-open-2026-27.excerpt: Applications are now open for Nursery to Class 10. Limited seats available — apply early to secure your child's place.

sslc-results-2025.title: Outstanding SSLC Results: 100% Pass with 40% Distinctions
sslc-results-2025.excerpt: Our Class 10 students have once again made the school proud with a 100% pass rate in the SSLC board examinations.

annual-day-2026.title: Annual Day Celebration — 'Roots and Wings'
annual-day-2026.excerpt: A spectacular evening of dance, drama, and music as students showcased their talents to a packed audience.

science-fair-district-winners.title: Pioneer Students Win District Science Fair
science-fair-district-winners.excerpt: Our Class 8 team's water-conservation model won first prize at the district-level science exhibition.

summer-vacation-circular.title: Circular: Summer Vacation and Reopening Dates
summer-vacation-circular.excerpt: The school will remain closed for summer vacation from April 10. Classes resume on May 29 for the new academic year.

independence-day-2025.title: Independence Day Celebrated with Patriotic Fervour
independence-day-2025.excerpt: Flag hoisting, cultural programmes, and a march-past marked the 79th Independence Day at our campus.

events.title: Campus Tour Day for New Parents

nursery.name: Nursery
nursery.summary: A joyful first step into school life, where play-based learning builds curiosity, confidence, and early social skills.

lkg.name: LKG
lkg.summary: Lower Kindergarten strengthens early literacy and numeracy foundations through structured play and guided discovery.

ukg.name: UKG
ukg.summary: Upper Kindergarten prepares children for Class 1 with reading fluency, number work, and growing independence.

primary.name: Primary (Classes 1–5)
primary.summary: The primary years build strong fundamentals in languages, mathematics, science, and values through engaging classrooms.

middle.name: Middle School (Classes 6–8)
middle.summary: Middle school deepens subject knowledge, introduces laboratory work, and develops independent study skills.

secondary.name: Secondary (Classes 9–10)
secondary.summary: Focused board-exam preparation with rigorous academics, mentoring, and career guidance for every student.

testimonials.quote: Pioneer Public School has been a blessing for our family. The teachers know every child by name and genuinely care about their progress. My daughter looks forward to school every single day.
testimonials.name: Mrs. Lakshmi Devi

testimonials.quote: The individual attention my son receives here is remarkable. His confidence in mathematics improved dramatically within one year, and the teachers keep us informed at every step.
testimonials.name: Mr. Suresh Kumar

testimonials.quote: I love our science lab classes and the annual science fair. Our teachers encourage us to ask questions and try experiments ourselves instead of just reading from books.
testimonials.name: Ananya R.

testimonials.quote: The foundation I received at Pioneer helped me excel in my pre-university studies. The discipline and study habits from Classes 9 and 10 still guide me today.
testimonials.name: Kiran Patil

testimonials.quote: What sets this school apart is the balance — academics are strong, but sports, music, and values get equal importance. It is a truly holistic education.
testimonials.name: Mrs. Farzana Begum

testimonials.quote: Being part of the student council taught me leadership skills I use every day. Pioneer gave me the stage to grow beyond textbooks.
testimonials.name: Mohammed Imran

achievements.title: 100% SSLC Pass Result
achievements.description: Every Class 10 student cleared the SSLC board examination, with 40% securing distinction.

achievements.title: District Science Fair — First Prize
achievements.description: Our Class 8 team won first place in the district-level science exhibition for their water-conservation model.

achievements.title: Taluk-Level Kabaddi Champions
achievements.description: The senior boys' kabaddi team brought home the taluk championship trophy for the second consecutive year.

achievements.title: National Mathematics Olympiad Qualifiers
achievements.description: Five students qualified for the second round of the National Mathematics Olympiad.

achievements.title: Best School Award — Bhagyanagar, Koppal Taluk
achievements.description: Recognised by the local education department for excellence in academics and co-curricular activities.

achievements.title: State-Level Drawing Competition Winner
achievements.description: A Class 6 student won the state-level drawing competition among 2,000+ participants.

about.title: About Pioneer Public School
about.description: A decade of nurturing confident, compassionate learners in the heart of Bhagyanagar, Koppal.

history.title: Rooted in Bhagyanagar, Koppal — Reaching for the World
history.p1: Pioneer Public School was established in 2015 with a simple conviction: the children of Bhagyanagar, Koppal deserve a school that matches the best anywhere — in teaching quality, in values, and in opportunity.
history.p2: What began as a small primary school in Pragati Nagar has grown into a vibrant community of 300+ students and 20+ dedicated staff, offering a complete education from Nursery to Class 10.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted school in the region — a place where every child discovers their strengths, builds strong character, and leaves prepared to lead in a changing world.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Deliver concept-first, joyful learning in every classroom.
Give equal weight to academics, arts, sports, and values.
Partner closely with parents in every child's journey.
Keep quality education accessible to our community.

principal.title: Every Child Carries a Spark
principal.p1: "Education is not only about marks — it is about awakening. Our teachers work every day to help children fall in love with learning, stand up with confidence, and treat others with kindness.
principal.p2: When you walk through our corridors, you will hear questions, laughter, and music. That is the sound of childhood being honoured. I invite you to visit us and see it for yourself."

items.event: Pioneer Public School founded in Bhagyanagar, Koppal with Nursery to Class 5.
Extended to Middle School (Classes 6–8); science and computer labs inaugurated.
First batch of Class 10; secondary section fully established.
Smart classrooms introduced across all grades.
Awarded Best School in Bhagyanagar, Koppal Taluk for holistic education.
100% SSLC pass rate with 40% distinctions; 300+ students strong.

faculty.description: A dedicated team of educators and administrators committed to every child's growth.

items.name: Middle School Team
items.note: Subject experts in science, mathematics, and languages.

items.name: Secondary Team
items.note: Board-exam mentors with consistently strong results.

values.title: The Pioneer Way

items.name: Integrity
items.description: Doing the right thing, even when no one is watching.

items.name: Excellence
items.description: Giving our best in academics, sports, and character.

items.name: Respect
items.description: Valuing every person, culture, and point of view.

items.name: Curiosity
items.description: Asking questions and never stopping to learn.

items.name: Responsibility

items.name: Compassion
items.description: Leading with kindness inside and outside school.

recognition.title: Recognition
recognition.text: Pioneer Public School is recognised by the Department of Public Instruction, Government of Karnataka, and follows the Karnataka State Board syllabus with English as the medium of instruction.

disclosure.title: Mandatory Disclosure
disclosure.text: Statutory documents — recognition certificates, building safety, fire safety, and staff details — are available for inspection at the school office and will be published in the Parents section as downloads.

admissions.title: Admissions 2026–27
admissions.description: Join the Pioneer family — admissions are open from Nursery to Class 10. Seats are limited.

steps.title: Enquire
steps.description: Submit the enquiry form below or visit the school office.

steps.title: Visit the Campus
steps.description: Tour our classrooms, labs, and grounds — meet our teachers.

steps.title: Interaction
steps.description: A friendly readiness interaction for Classes 1–9 (no test for pre-primary).

steps.title: Confirm Admission
steps.description: Submit documents, complete the fee formalities, and welcome aboard!

items.age: Age appropriate to grade, with previous school records

documents.title: Required Documents
items: Transfer certificate — for Class 1 and above
Four passport-size photographs of the child
Two passport-size photographs of each parent

fee.title: Fee Information
fee.text: Our fee structure is designed to keep quality education accessible to the families of Bhagyanagar, Koppal. Detailed, grade-wise fee information for 2026–27 is available at the school office and will be shared during your campus visit or enquiry call.

items.question: What is the age criterion for Nursery admission?
items.answer: Children should be at least 3 years old as of June 1 of the admission year for Nursery. For LKG the minimum age is 4 years, and for UKG it is 5 years.

items.question: What documents are required at the time of admission?
items.answer: Birth certificate, transfer certificate (for Class 1 and above), previous year's report card, Aadhaar card copies of the child and parents, caste/income certificate if applicable, and four passport-size photographs.

items.question: Is there an entrance test for admission?
items.answer: There is no entrance test for Nursery to UKG. For Classes 1–9, a simple interaction and written readiness assessment is conducted to understand the child's learning level — it is not an elimination test.

items.question: What is the medium of instruction?
items.answer: English is the medium of instruction. Kannada and Hindi are taught as second and third languages following the three-language formula.

items.question: Does the school provide transport?
items.answer: Yes, the school operates safe bus routes covering Bhagyanagar, Koppal, and surrounding areas. Transport details and route maps are available at the school office.

items.question: How can I schedule a campus visit?
items.answer: You can book a campus tour through the form on our Admissions page, call the admissions office, or simply walk in on any working day between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM.

enquiryForm.title: Admission Enquiry
enquiryForm.description: Fill in your details and our admissions team will call you within one working day.

visitForm.title: Book a Campus Visit
visitForm.description: See our classrooms, meet our teachers, and get all your questions answered in person.

academics.title: Academics
academics.description: A carefully sequenced learning journey from the first day of Nursery to the SSLC board examinations.

academicDetail.downloadsText: Detailed syllabus documents and booklists will be published here at the start of each academic year. Meanwhile, copies are available at the school office.

campusLife.title: Campus Life
campusLife.description: School is more than classrooms. At Pioneer, every day holds a stage, a field, a lab, and a library waiting to be explored.

items.title: Sports & Games
items.description: Daily physical education plus coaching in kabaddi, kho-kho, cricket, volleyball, and athletics on our spacious grounds.

items.title: Arts & Craft
items.description: A dedicated art room where students explore drawing, painting, and craft — with their best work displayed across campus.

items.title: Music & Dance
items.description: Vocal, instrumental, and classical/folk dance training that culminates in stage performances through the year.

items.title: Science & STEM
items.description: Hands-on experiments, working models, and a school science club that feeds our award-winning science fair teams.

items.title: Library & Reading
items.description: A calm reading space with storybooks, encyclopaedias, and periodicals — plus dedicated library periods for every class.

items.title: Clubs & Competitions
items.description: Quiz, elocution, spell bee, and eco clubs give every child a platform to discover and sharpen their talents.

items.title: House System
items.description: Every student belongs to one of four houses — Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, and Topaz — competing all year for the house trophy.

items.title: Educational Tours
items.description: Age-appropriate excursions — from local field visits for tiny tots to heritage and science-centre trips for seniors.

items.title: Celebrations & Annual Day
items.description: Independence Day, Republic Day, festivals, and a grand Annual Day where every child gets a moment on stage.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Browse moments from school life. Filter by category or year, and click any photo to view it larger.
gallery.noPhotos: No photos match the selected filters yet.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.description: Every trophy tells a story of effort. Here are some of our proudest recent moments.
